rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-based assumptions and guarantees
Use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings and assignments
generic_rules: AGREE annexes must reside within valid AADL component type or implementation scopes
Assumptions and guarantees should reference only visible component features
Generated AGREE expressions must maintain type consistency and use only declared helpers
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Avoid referencing non-visible identifiers or undefined helpers in AGREE annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Model unit and package qualification in AGREE
